Vehicle.title: Vehicle
Vehicle.description: Represents a vehicle in the dealership's inventory.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Vehicle entity.

marca.description: The brand of the vehicle, e.g., 'Audi'.

modelo.description: The model of the vehicle, e.g., 'Q5'.

ano.description: The manufacturing year of the vehicle.

precio.description: The price of the vehicle. Optional.

kilometraje.description: The mileage of the vehicle in kilometers.

combustible.description: The type of fuel the vehicle uses.

transmision.description: The transmission type of the vehicle.

descripcion.description: A detailed description of the vehicle.

destacado.description: Flag to feature the vehicle on the homepage.

vendido.description: Flag to mark the vehicle as sold.

fechaCreacion.description: Timestamp of when the vehicle was added.

imagenPrincipalUrl.description: Main image URL for the vehicle.

galeriaImagenesUrls.description: Array of image URLs for the vehicle's gallery.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the system.

definition.description: Stores all vehicles for the dealership.

params.name: vehicleId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific vehicle.

definition.description: A collection where the existence of a document signifies that the corresponding user ID (adminId) has administrator privileges.

params.name: adminId
params.description: The unique identifier of a user who has administrator privileges.
